scripts.build:packages: npm -w @watchwarden/types run build && npm -w @watchwarden/sdk run build
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm -w watchwarden-controller run build && npm -w ui run build
scripts.test: npm -w watchwarden-controller run test && npm -w ui run test
scripts.lint: npm -w watchwarden-controller run lint && npm -w ui run lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm -w watchwarden-controller run lint:fix && npm -w ui run lint:fix
scripts.format: npm -w watchwarden-controller run format && npm -w ui run format
scripts.type-check: npm -w @watchwarden/types run build && npm -w @watchwarden/sdk run build && npm -w watchwarden-controller run type-check && npm -w ui run type-check
scripts.docker: docker compose build && docker compose up
scripts.docker:d: npm run docker:build && npm run docker:up
